name: git commit
description: Record changes to the repository by creating a new commit with a message describing the changes

options.label: Stage all modified files
options.description: Automatically stage all modified and deleted files before committing

options.label: Amend last commit
options.description: Replace the most recent commit with a new commit incorporating the staged changes

options.label: No edit
options.description: Use the previous commit message without launching an editor

options.label: Sign-off
options.description: Add a Signed-off-by trailer to the commit message

options.label: Verbose
options.description: Show unified diff of changes being committed in the editor

options.label: Dry run
options.description: Show what would be committed without actually creating a commit

positionalArgs.label: Pathspec
positionalArgs.description: Specific files to include in the commit

examples.label: Commit all changes with a message
Amend the last commit without changing the message
Quick commit all changes with sign-off
Verbose dry run to preview what would be committed
Amend last commit with new message

values.message: fix: correct typo in error handler
